'''ladhoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roach|roach]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-dh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roach|roach]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ladhoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lædhereth|lædhereth]] || [[word:lædherej|lædherej]] || [[word:lædheresh|lædheresh]] || [[word:lædhere|lædhere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ladhodhoroth|ladhodhoroth]] || [[word:ladhodhoroj|ladhodhoroj]] || [[word:ladhodhorosh|ladhodhorosh]] || [[word:ladhodhoro|ladhodhoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ladhoroth|ladhoroth]] || [[word:ladhoroj|ladhoroj]] || [[word:ladhorosh|ladhorosh]] || [[word:ladhoro|ladhoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ladhofroth|ladhofroth]] || [[word:ladhofroj|ladhofroj]] || [[word:ladhofrosh|ladhofrosh]] || [[word:ladhofrof|ladhofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ladhorotho|ladhorotho]] || [[word:ladhorojo|ladhorojo]] || [[word:ladhorosho|ladhorosho]] || [[word:ladhoroko|ladhoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ladhoroth|ladhoroth]] || [[word:ladhoroj|ladhoroj]] || [[word:ladhorosh|ladhorosh]] || [[word:ladhoro|ladhoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ladhorothol|ladhorothol]] || [[word:ladhorojol|ladhorojol]] || [[word:ladhoroshol|ladhoroshol]] || [[word:ladhorokol|ladhorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ladhorothotho|ladhorothotho]] || [[word:ladhorojojo|ladhorojojo]] || [[word:ladhoroshosho|ladhoroshosho]] || [[word:ladhoroko|ladhoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ladhorothon|ladhorothon]] || [[word:ladhorojon|ladhorojon]] || [[word:ladhoroshon|ladhoroshon]] || [[word:ladhorokon|ladhorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ladhorothoro|ladhorothoro]] || [[word:ladhorojoro|ladhorojoro]] || [[word:ladhoroshoro|ladhoroshoro]] || [[word:ladhorokoro|ladhorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
